prose:
Pyridine frontier-orbital energies — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`; this calculation was a single point and did not optimize the geometry. SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported.

HOMO energy = -7.2526 eV
LUMO energy = -1.1128 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap = 6.1398 eV
